message:
Hey Laura, shifts are waiting for you! You completed the Circle K orientation but still need to do a quick background check before you can pick up shifts. Open the Shiftsmart app and tap "Start Background Check" — takes about 5 minutes. Once it clears, you'll see available shifts near you right away.

Reply HELP if you have any questions!
